title: Bionano Genomics (BNGO) Stock Quote and Overview
text: Bionano Genomics Inc (NASDAQ: BNGO) is a molecular diagnostics company specializing in optical genome mapping technology. The company develops products and software for genome analysis, with primary applications in cancer diagnostics, genetic disorder detection, and research. Trading on NASDAQ under ticker BNGO, the stock has shown volatility reflecting the company's earlier stage nature and near-term financial challenges. Recent financial performance shows revenue stabilization in the $6-7M per quarter range in 2025-2026, with improving margins. The company is advancing toward profitability through cost discipline and operational leverage. Key catalysts include: reimbursement expansion (CPT codes), installed base utilization growth, software adoption, and potential balance sheet improvements. Analyst coverage is positive with Strong Buy consensus and price targets suggesting significant upside. The stock reflects typical biotech risk-reward dynamics with meaningful upside potential balanced against execution and market adoption risks.
